overview: A stunning AI-powered face swap web app inspired by Deep Live Cam. Upload a source face and a target photo, hit swap, and download the result. Powered by Replicate's face-swap AI model with a dark, futuristic UI.
features: Drag-and-drop image upload with live previews
AI face swap via Replicate API
Download swapped result with one click
Dark futuristic UI with neon accents and glassmorphism
